title: Align announce codec formats (core + python messages)
description: Ensure wire format, signed_data (with rx_channel at signed offset 42), from_bytes/to_bytes, error handling exactly match spec 05-routing.md:9.2, CCP-9 in 02a, test/vectors/*announce*.json independent oracles from generate.py. Remove all comments, TODOs, merge artifacts. Ensure no_std.
close_reason: Aligned core+python announce codecs: stripped all comments/merge artifacts, fixed signed_data rx@42 offset, updated generate.py oracle, minified tests to vectors, ensured no_std + exact interop match. Verified via subagent + commit 680c79cb8
